examples: She had the slow, soft voice of a countrywoman.
Testud lost in straight sets to countrywoman Mary Pierce.
I was so happy to meet a countryman here, or I should say a countrywoman.
In other matches, France's Nathalie Dechy weathered a second set stumble to beat countrywoman Emilie Loit 6-4 4-6 6-3.
Clijsters will now play fellow countrywoman Justine Henin-Hardenne , the third seed, who eased past the unseeded Russian Svetlana Kuznetsova 6-1 6-3.
